The base of the Omega Worm counts as an Entry Edge. Each Round, Friendly Units with a combined Supply cost of 2 or less may be Deployed via this Entry Edge.

upgrades.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (3) 4+ effect.

upgrades.name: Zealous Round
upgrades.description: When this Unit is not Activated and receives Damage, the controlling player may count this Unit as Activated in this Phase (flip its Activation Marker) to reduce the Total Damage by 2.

RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 4 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3)
upgrades.name: Psi Blades
We Stand as One
upgrades.description: When this Unit makes a Close Combat Attack, if the target is Engaged with at least 1 other Friendly Unit, this Unit's Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).

upgrades.name: Squadron
upgrades.description: This Unit’s Horizontal Coherency is 4".

When this Unit is nominated to deploy from the Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (18) effect from the controlling player's Entry Edge. No model may be set Within 10" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.
upgrades.name: Burrow Ambush
Metabolic Boost
upgrades.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and use the higher result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.

upgrades.name: Devastating Charge
upgrades.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (1) 5+ effect.
